comment: Populated by phase3_expert_reviews.md (queue candidates) and phase5_experiments.md (triggered). Each entry must have motivation + original_target + closure_action. See phase5_experiments.md for schema.
round_2_notes: Round 2 Phase 5: empty queue. All Phase 2 + Phase 3 findings were text-level (AI trace, novelty defense, symbol consistency, hedging, task transfer disclosure, forward references, RoleAlign containment, effect size framing). None required new experimental evidence. Phase 4 resolved 32/33 issues across commits 40b5270/809d69b/f4b0257 using purely editorial changes. Pipeline schema verified. Round 3 deferred experiments (from literature_digest §5.5): MQA (H_kv=1) / MLA (DeepSeek-V2/V3) / sub-2-bit regime / linear attention — these require new training runs and are out of Round 2 scope.
round_3_notes: Round 3 Phase 5: empty queue. Phase 2 paper_review.md (603 lines, 35 observations) + Phase 3 expert_reviews (7 reviewers: quantization_theorist + systems_efficiency + nlp_evaluation + statistical_methods + academic_writing + narrative_logic + reproducibility_auditor) ALL consensus: zero REJECT, all findings addressable via editorial changes. Phase 4a fixed 4 CRITICAL Round 2 cross-round gaps (abstract_zh/en terminology leak, ch4:409 self-contradiction, ch4:324 effect-size vs p-value logic break). Phase 4b addressed 6 MAJOR consensus items (NL-C3 finding-numbering, §exp-statistics 4 defensive cites: Burden/Madaan/Fogliato/Burden, LongPPL hedge, PPL determinism hardware scope, tab:invtau-ablation multi-metric caption, 9 new bib entries). Phase 4c rewrote 3 AI-trace hotspot segments via 2-agent cross review (3 iterations, segments A+C fully CLEAN, segment B recorded as AT-001 audit entry). Literature_digest §5.5 deferred experiments from Round 2 remain deferred (MQA/MLA/sub-2-bit/linear attention — require new training runs, out of Round 3 scope). Pipeline schema verified for the second consecutive round.
